Why_tested: Tests whether demographic and operating context alone is enough.
Decision: Rejected; validation is much weaker without readiness.

Why_tested: Adds the main readiness signal with a simple monotone probability shape.
Decision: Rejected; ranking is strong but probability quality is worse.

Why_tested: Tests whether risk accelerates near low readiness values.
Decision: Rejected; close to selected model, but less directly aligned with the discovered threshold shape.

Why_tested: Checks whether a more flexible polynomial improves fit enough to justify instability risk.
Decision: Rejected; added polynomial curvature without improving the operating story.

Why_tested: Uses the smooth shape discovery to encode separate readiness regions.
Tests recurring assessment-window structure without making periodicity the headline.
Decision: Benchmark only; periodic terms did not justify replacing the operating model.

Why_tested: Flexible nonlinear benchmark for the readiness curve.
Decision: Benchmark only; used to test whether flexible curvature changes the conclusion.
